name: Slack
description: Read channels, post messages, and search workspace history from your agent.
installHint: Create a Slack app with the required scopes, then paste its bot token below.

envFields.label: Team / Workspace ID
envFields.helperText: First get your [Slack URL](https://slack.com/help/articles/221769328-Locate-your-Slack-URL-or-ID#find-your-url). Then use that to get your [Workspace ID](https://slack.com/help/articles/221769328-Locate-your-Slack-URL-or-ID#find-your-workspace-or-org-id).

envFields.label: Bot token
envFields.helperText: You'll need to create or have access to a [Slack App](https://github.com/zencoderai/slack-mcp-server#slack-bot-setup) to get a Bot token.
